expo.name: People Memory
expo.description: Your personal memory for every person you meet. Track trust, notes, likes, and important dates — all stored privately on your device.

infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: People Memory needs access to your photos so you can set a profile picture for your contacts.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: People Memory needs access to your camera so you can take a profile photo for your contacts.

plugins.photosPermission: People Memory needs access to your photos so you can set a profile picture for your contacts.
plugins.cameraPermission: People Memory needs access to your camera so you can take a profile photo.
